description: Current-head TinyLlama exact-row broader prompt pack covering short, trailing whitespace, special characters, a longer instruction, and multiline-long marker-template generation without implying neighboring rows or other quantizations.

prompts.message: Reply with the word camelid and preserve this prompt's trailing spaces.
Echo a compact summary of these symbols: []{}<>|~^`\ and emoji alpaca 🦙.
In two short sentences, explain why deterministic token parity matters for a local GGUF inference backend under a strict support contract.
prompts.note: Longer natural-language instruction within the 50-token budget.

messages.content: Keep the response concise and deterministic.

Line one asks for a tiny checklist.

  Line two is indented and mentions TinyLlama Q8_0.
Line three asks for exactly three terse bullets about evidence hygiene.

prompts.note: Harsher multiline marker-template prompt matching the old broader-gate intent.
